title: Final Closures: Storage Substrate & Profile Parity
author: orchestrator
summary: Two remaining closures to reach full definition: (1) Storage Substrate — Postgres becomes the only live write backend, DuckDB is wired as analytical sidecar, all Database.use paths go through the adapter seam, and SQLite is removed; (2) Profile Parity — repo source agents, approvals, permissions, and skills match installed OpenCode behavior. Execution is sequential and must not skip evidence gates.

current_state.database_adapter: Fully implemented in packages/opencode/src/storage/adapter.ts with DrizzleLikeClient Interface (query, transaction, afterCommit), SQLiteAdapter impl, PgAdapter impl, and defaultLayer selecting based on OPENCODE_DATABASE_URL presence. Phase 1 adapter hardening complete (13 unit tests passing, afterCommit refactored, discriminated transaction options, retry support).
current_state.postgres_schema_files: All 8 .pg.sql.ts files exist: session.pg.sql.ts, project.pg.sql.ts, account.pg.sql.ts, workspace.pg.sql.ts, event.pg.sql.ts, share.pg.sql.ts, schema.pg.sql.ts, data-migration.pg.sql.ts. drizzle.config.pg.ts exists with dialect: postgresql. DrizzleLikeClient supports pg-core tables structurally.
current_state.adapter_consumers: 82 DatabaseAdapter references across codebase. Multiple consumers already use yield* DatabaseAdapter.Service pattern. 12-16 raw Database.* calls remain in 6 source files.
current_state.coordination_tool: Exists with wave types: learning, critique, execution, validation, stress, repair, documentation, publish, report.
current_state.sqlite_schema_files: All 8 .sqlite.sql.ts files exist alongside .pg.sql.ts variants. Runtime imports still reference .sqlite.sql.ts variants (~35-42 import sites).
current_state.sqlite_backend: db.bun.ts and db.node.ts still active. #db import alias points to bun-sqlite. json-migration.ts still active. SQLite PRAGMAs execute unconditionally.
current_state.postgres_ddl: migration-pg/ directory does not exist. drizzle-kit generate has not been run against drizzle.config.pg.ts.
current_state.data_migration: No migrate-to-pg CLI command exists. SQLite-to-Postgres one-way migration not implemented.
current_state.duckdb_analytical: Zero DuckDB references anywhere in the codebase (no imports, no config, no schemas, no sidecar).
current_state.ci_postgres: No Postgres service container in GitHub Actions. No test/fixture/pg.ts exists. No CI-backed Postgres test runner.
current_state.coordination_persistence: coordination.ts is purely in-memory Maps. No disk-backed or database-backed persistent coordination state.
current_state.credential_isolation: FLAG.OPENCODE_DATABASE_URL reads process.env at module load time — no Effect Redacted-based credential management for database URL.

profile_parity.orchestrator_agent: No orchestrator.md in .opencode/agent/. No wave-model orchestrator enforcement.
profile_parity.subagents: No critic/reviewer, executor, validator, stress, or repair agent profiles in .opencode/agent/.
profile_parity.approval_gates: plan_approval.v1.json schema exists as doc artifact. red_team_approval and repair_plan_approval schemas do not exist.
profile_parity.permissions: opencode.jsonc has empty permissions — no read/search/task-only enforcement for orchestrator.
profile_parity.installed_skills: Only 2 skills in repo (effect, improve-codebase-architecture) vs ~13 in installed OpenCode.
profile_parity.legacy_profiles: Legacy reviewer profiles and no long-horizon senior-engineer behavior default.

current_state.typecheck_baseline: 280 pre-existing errors (Effect v4 beta Layer R-type mismatches in test files, not caused by storage work).

dirty_file_audit.audit_command: git status --porcelain (run at plan creation time)
dirty_file_audit.total_modified: 0 baseline (fresh plan — dirty file audit to be updated at execution time by subagent)

convert sync convertEvent callback (line ~15) to accept DatabaseAdapter.Service via Effect context

convert 3 raw Database.use calls to DatabaseAdapter.Service
verify any remaining raw calls migrated; process() already uses adapter.afterCommit per Phase 1

add DuckDB layer provision and credential-secured DB init

dirty_file_audit.conflict_policy: If any edit would remove or conflict with existing modifications (from parallel agents), stop and report the conflict. Preserve all pre-existing modifications exactly. Use expected_before_sha256 on all search_replace operations on dirty files.

tracks.name: Storage Substrate
tracks.exit_condition: Postgres is the only live write backend for runtime state. DuckDB is wired as the analytical/read-model sidecar. Every SQLite-native schema has a Postgres-native equivalent (DONE — verified in current_state). A one-way SQLite → Postgres data migration exists. All live Database.use/Database.transaction paths are behind the adapter seam. SQLite runtime files and SQLite-native schemas are removed.

phases.name: DuckDB Analytical Sidecar
phases.description: Install DuckDB dependencies (@duckdb/duckdb-wasm or duckdb npm package). Create analytical schema definitions using DuckDB-native SQL (parquet-backed reads, JSON extraction). Create db.duckdb.ts init function. Register DuckDB layer in app-runtime.ts and bootstrap-runtime.ts. Wire DuckDB as read-model sidecar — not as write backend. Analytical queries route to DuckDB, transactional writes route to Postgres. Add #db-duckdb import alias to package.json. Add DuckDB adapter class to adapter.ts (read-only Interface subset). Update DrizzleLikeClient to accept DuckDB structurally if needed.
files_changed: packages/opencode/package.json (add @duckdb/duckdb-wasm or duckdb npm package, add #db-duckdb alias)
packages/opencode/bun.lock
packages/opencode/src/storage/db.duckdb.ts (new — DuckDB init function with analytical query support)
packages/opencode/src/storage/adapter.ts (add DuckDBAdapter or read-only layer registration)
packages/opencode/src/effect/app-runtime.ts (add DuckDB layer provision)
packages/opencode/src/effect/bootstrap-runtime.ts (add DuckDB layer provision)
packages/opencode/src/storage/schema.duckdb.ts (new — DuckDB analytical schema definitions if needed)
phases.acceptance: DuckDB dependency installs. db.duckdb.ts creates DuckDB connection. app-runtime.ts and bootstrap-runtime.ts provide DuckDB layer. Analytical queries can route to DuckDB. typecheck passes. DuckDBAdapter compiles. Existing Postgres transaction path unaffected.

phases.name: Generate Postgres DDL + Migration Directory
phases.description: Run drizzle-kit generate against drizzle.config.pg.ts to produce initial Postgres migration in migration-pg/. Create migration-pg/ directory with the generated SQL files. Apply migration on startup when Postgres backend is active (modify db.pg.ts init to run migrations). Verify generated DDL is valid Postgres (no SQLite-specific syntax like json_extract, no PRAGMA statements).
files_changed: packages/opencode/migration-pg/ (new directory with generated DDL files)
packages/opencode/src/storage/db.pg.ts (add migration loading path: run drizzle-kit generated SQL on first connect)
phases.acceptance: drizzle-kit generate runs successfully with zero errors. migration-pg/ directory contains valid Postgres DDL. Migration applies on Postgres backend startup. Syntax verified: no SQLite-specific functions or PRAGMAs in generated DDL.
blocking_defects: Phase 0.5 database_security_doctrine.v1 ratified
.pg.sql.ts schema files verified against target Postgres version

phases.name: Credential Isolation with Effect Redacted
phases.description: Replace FLAG.OPENCODE_DATABASE_URL process.env reads at module load time with Effect Config-backed credential management using Effect Redacted. Create DatabaseConfig Effect module that reads OPENCODE_DATABASE_URL via Config.redacted(). Wire credential provisioning into app-runtime.ts and bootstrap-runtime.ts. Ensure credentials never leak into subprocess env. Document in database_security_doctrine.v1.json.

phases.name: Migrate All Remaining Database Consumers to Adapter
phases.description: Convert all remaining direct Database.use/Database.transaction calls to DatabaseAdapter.Service. Target inventory: workspace.ts line ~986 (waitEvent sync callback), server/shared/fence.ts line ~15 (plain load function), server/projectors.ts line ~15 (sync convertEvent callback), data-migration.ts (4 calls + json_extract → jsonb operators), project/project.ts (3 standalone calls), sync/index.ts (verified in Phase 1, but audit for any remaining). Handle json_extract sql tagged templates → Postgres jsonb operators (->> for text extraction, ::numeric cast for numeric extraction). All files must be typecheck-clean after conversion.

phases.name: SQLite-to-Postgres Data Migration Command
phases.description: Write migrate-to-pg.ts CLI command in packages/opencode/src/cli/cmd/. Reads SQLite directly via Database import from ./storage/db (bypassing adapter layer for read-only source access). Writes to Postgres via PGlite/pg client (bypassing adapter layer for write-only destination access). Pre-migration FK audit on existing SQLite data (report violations, halt if found). Post-migration verification: row count per table + SHA256 checksum match between SQLite source and Postgres destination. Rollback: renames opencode.db to opencode.db.pre-pg-migration. Create migration flag file (.rig/postgres-migration-complete).

tracks.name: Profile Parity
tracks.exit_condition: Repo source (.opencode/agent/, opencode.jsonc, skills/) can reproduce the installed OpenCode agent behavior: orchestrator agent with wave-model subagents, approval artifact gates, proper permission restrictions, reviewer set with long-horizon behavior, validator self-audit rules, and matching installed skills.
tracks.note_on_paths: .opencode/agent/ is the target directory for agent profiles. opencode.jsonc is the target file for permissions. opencode.jsonc has empty permissions — executor must verify exact structure before editing. Some profile parity work targets src/agent/ (source-level agent config) vs .opencode/agent/ (repo-local config). Executor must distinguish between the two and verify exact target path before editing.

phases.name: Orchestrator Agent Profile With Wave Model
phases.description: Create .opencode/agent/orchestrator.md with wave-model orchestration behavior: learning-first, delegate-first, no-self-inspection rule, approval-artifact gates (plan_approval.v1.json, red_team_approval.v1.json, repair_plan_approval.v1.json) as first-class enforced gates. Orchestrator reads current revision count from state JSON and halts if exceeds 5. Orchestrator enforces the chronology state machine (code commit → yield → audit receipt → commit audit). Orchestrator remains read/search/task-only — no mutation capabilities beyond sending messages and reading messages.
files_changed: .opencode/agent/orchestrator.md (new — wave-model orchestrator agent profile with approval gate enforcement)
phases.acceptance: orchestrator.md exists with wave-model instructions matching installed behavior. Approval artifacts referenced by path. Chronology state machine encoded. Orchestrator restricted to read/search/task-only.

phases.name: Wave-Model Subagent Profiles
phases.description: Create subagent profiles for each wave type: critic/reviewer (long-horizon senior engineer — 3 architectural proposals per review), executor (additive edits, dirty-file preservation, blast radius control), validator (self-validation-before-handoff rule, schema validation, bounded checks), stress (hostile pass with 5-minute review cycle, attack concurrency/contention/recovery/leaks/input), repair (JSON repair directives, no deadlock loops).

.opencode/agent/executor.md (new — additive edits, blast radius control, dirty-file preservation)
.opencode/agent/validator.md (new — self-validation-before-handoff, schema validation, bounded checks)
.opencode/agent/stress.md (new — hostile pass, 'break my newest mechanism', attack surface enumeration)
.opencode/agent/repair.md (new — JSON repair directives, delta-focused, no deadlock loops)
phases.acceptance: All 5 subagent profiles exist. Critic encodes three-proposal requirement. Validator encodes self-validation-before-handoff. Stress encodes focused hostile pass. Repair encodes JSON directive consumption. Each profile references its approval gate dependencies.

phases.description: Update opencode.jsonc with proper permission restrictions. Orchestrator: read/search/task-only (no mutation). Executor: write allowed but limited to target files. Enforce AGENTS.md conventions: no git amend/force-push, no git restore/checkout/reset/clean for undo, no dirty file discarding.

rollback_strategy.method: Per-phase checkpoint commits with pinned SQLite version retained through Phase 1.6
rollback_strategy.pre_1.6_code_rollback: git revert the most recent checkpoint commit. Pre-1.6 work is purely additive (new files, adapter additions, schema additions) and does not remove SQLite. DuckDB and credential isolation changes are backward-compatible.
rollback_strategy.post_1.6_data_rollback: Unset OPENCODE_DATABASE_URL. Rename opencode.db.pre-pg-migration back to opencode.db. Postgres drops are reversible by reapplying the initial migration-pg/ DDL. Migration flag file removed.
rollback_strategy.post_1.7_rollback: git revert the Phase 1.7 checkpoint commit + restore .db.pre-pg-migration. Phase 1.7 is the only destructive removal phase (removes SQLite files). Pre-1.7 rollback path available as long as Phase 1.7 is not committed.
rollback_strategy.pre_1.7_stoppage: Phase 1.6 (data migration) and Phase 1.7 (SQLite cleanup) are gated by explicit approval. Do not proceed to Phase 1.7 until Phase 1.6 migration is verified in CI and all adapter consumer conversion is complete.
rollback_strategy.track_2_rollback: Track 2 (Profile Parity) is entirely additive (new files in .opencode/agent/, .opencode/skills/). Rollback is git revert of the checkpoint commit. No permanent destructive changes.

data_integrity_checks: Pre-migration (Phase 1.6): FK constraint audit on existing SQLite data. Repair violations before migration begins.
Post-migration (Phase 1.6): Row count per table + SHA256 checksum match between SQLite source and Postgres destination.
Rollback: Verify no data loss after rollback by comparing pre-copy checksums.
Phase 1.3: Verify workspace.ts waitEvent, projectors.ts convertEvent, fence.ts load produce identical results with DatabaseAdapter.Service as with raw Database.use.
Phase 1.0 (DuckDB): DuckDB must not shadow Postgres writes. Verify read-model isolation — DuckDB queries do not write through to Postgres.
Phase 1.7: grep for SQLite patterns (sqliteTable, bun-sqlite, better-sqlite3, db.bun, node-sqlite3, .sqlite.sql.ts) in src/ before and after cleanup.
out_of_scope: DuckDB full analytical query optimization and integration into agent-facing tools (DuckDB is wired but agent tools do not yet consume DuckDB for synthesized conclusions — documented in deferred seams)
effect-drizzle-pg bridge package (DrizzleLikeClient wrapper pattern is intentional boundary)
New database-backed features beyond migration and sidecar wiring
PGlite full feature verification against all Postgres DDL features (deferred to proof-of-use)
DuckDB Wasm in-browser support (desktop-native parquet reads are sufficient)
Migration of existing CI workflows beyond Postgres service container addition
Architectural changes to Ralph scanner to consume DuckDB analytical results

full_definition_exit_conditions.postgres_is_only_write_backend: Phase 1.7 (SQLite cleanup) and Phase 1.8 (verification) complete. No SQLite runtime files remain. #db alias points to db.pg.ts. All Database.use calls migrated to adapter.
full_definition_exit_conditions.duckdb_wired_as_analytical_sidecar: Phase 1.0 (DuckDB) complete. db.duckdb.ts exists. app-runtime.ts and bootstrap-runtime.ts provide DuckDB layer. Analytical queries can route to DuckDB.
full_definition_exit_conditions.sqlite_to_postgres_migration_story: Phase 1.6 (data migration) complete. migrate-to-pg CLI command exists and is documented.
full_definition_exit_conditions.all_database_use_behind_adapter_seam: Phase 1.3 (adapter consumers) complete. Zero raw Database.use calls in src/.
full_definition_exit_conditions.agent_tools_return_decisions_receipts: Phase 2.1-2.6 (agent profiles) complete. Orchestrator agent enforces artifact-based handoff with approvals and receipts.
full_definition_exit_conditions.repo_matches_installed_behavior: Phase 2.1-2.6 (Profile Parity track) complete. Orchestrator, subagents, approvals, permissions, and skills match installed OpenCode.
full_definition_exit_conditions.critics_as_long_horizon_senior_engineers: Phase 2.2 (critic profile) complete. Critic encodes three-proposal requirement per review.
